title: Python Developer
description: Backend development using Python, Flask, Django, API services, and data workflows. Work with RESTful APIs, databases, and microservices.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Cloud infrastructure automation, deployment, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and DevOps operations. Manage scalable cloud solutions.

title: Data Analyst
description: SQL data analysis, dashboards, reporting, and business intelligence using data tools. Create insights from data.

title: Frontend Developer
description: React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, user interface design, and web applications. Build responsive user experiences.

title: AI / ML Engineer
description: Machine learning, AI model building, data science, and predictive analytics. Develop intelligent systems.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Full stack web development combining frontend and backend technologies. Build end-to-end web solutions.
